file_title: Boosting Customer Engagement Amid Retail Challenges
introduction: As we navigate the recent retail slump, it's essential for us at Lee's Market to focus on enhancing our on-floor customer engagements. This presentation will propose strategies to mitigate the sales decline and drive a rebound.

subsections.heading: Analyzing Canada's Current Retail Landscape
subsections.content:
• We observed a retail sales decline by 0.8% in Canada during July 2025, impacting Lee's Market's performance.
• To counter this, we focused on enhancing on-floor customer engagement, particularly through personalized product recommendations.
• An encouraging finding from this strategy was that in August 2025, 35% of customers who were provided with personalized recommendations in the previous month returned to make additional purchases.
• This indicates the effectiveness of personalized engagement, suggesting we should continue to focus on offering tailored advice to customers.
• Further analysis will be conducted to understand the detailed impact of the strategy on sales recovery and customer retention.
• A measurable rebound in the remaining months of 2025 will be sought by refining and expanding the personalized recommendation initiative.
• Additional training for sales associates could be implemented to enhance their ability to provide effective, personalized product suggestions.
subsections.justification: This content directly addresses the DR Question by illustrating how personalized product recommendations influenced customer engagement and sales recovery, underlining the importance of this strategy moving forward.

subsections.heading: Exploring On-Floor Customer Engagement Tactics
subsections.content:
• Use of digital signage improves customer experience
• In-store events and workshops can boost foot traffic
• Personalized customer service enhances customer loyalty
• Implementing self-checkout kiosks can speed up the checkout process
• Offering free Wi-Fi can increase dwell time
• Interactive product demonstrations can drive sales
subsections.justification: The content discusses potential customer engagement tactics but doesn't specifically address how they can counteract a sales decline.

subsections.heading: Projecting Impacts of Enhanced Customer Engagement
subsections.content:
• Enhanced customer engagement can increase average transaction value
• Improved customer experience can lead to repeat visits
• Positive word-of-mouth can attract new customers
• The implementation cost of new engagement strategies
• Potential increase in staff training and development costs
• Enhanced engagement tactics may require infrastructure upgrades
subsections.justification: The content discusses the potential impacts of improved customer engagement but doesn't address how it can offset a specific sales decline.

conclusion: By focusing on innovative customer engagement methods, we can overcome the current retail challenges and drive measurable growth. Let's take these insights and turn them into action for the remaining months of 2025.
